tracks.rawText: 2:18RKT： SESIÓN 1 [J44DZu_rw_U] (1)v5.5CoverReggaeton track at 95 BPM in G minor, The arrangement features a heavy dembow rhythm with a punchy kick and crisp snare, A recurring staccato synth lead plays a rhythmic, high-pitched melody, Distorted electric guitar power chords provide rhythmic accents during transitions, The bass is a deep sub-bass that follows the kick pattern, Male vocals are processed with light autotune and heavy compression, alternating between melodic delivery and rhythmic chanting, Rapid-fire vocal ad-libs and 'tra-tra' vocal samples are used as rhythmic fills, The track includes record scratch effects and sudden silence gaps for dynamic emphasisPublishRemix
tracks.title: RKT： SESIÓN 1 [J44DZu_rw_U] (1)
